Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe
Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

Suite result: 4/4 PASS

TC-502  JSON ingestion (10k records)                 PASS

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

content.text: I have both files. I'll assess deadline risk against the sprint end date (2026-07-18) and write the findings.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint window: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Based on: sprint_14_task_assignments.txt, helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt
Assessment date context: testing log covers through 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

================================================================================
TASKS AT RISK OF MISSING SPRINT DEADLINE
================================================================================

1. HEL-243 — Data ingestion: date format normalization
   Assignee: Amir Hassan | Due: 2026-07-15 | Status: Blocked | Points: 5
   Risk level: HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Explicitly Blocked; open defect HEL-D-014 (HIGH severity).
   - Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY (~40% of Meridian source data).
   - Blocked pending Meridian sample data due 2026-07-15 — same day as task due date.
   - Even if sample data arrives on time, fix + retest may not complete by 07-15 or by sprint end.

2. HEL-246 — UAT environment: server provisioning
   Assignee: Nadia Petrov | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: At Risk | Points: 8
   Risk level: HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Already flagged "At Risk" in the assignment board.
   - 8-point infrastructure task with due date only 2 days before sprint end.
   - No evidence of progress in the testing log; UAT readiness is a common sprint dependency.

3. HEL-245 — Integration test suite: data pipeline
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: In Progress | Points: 5
   Risk level: HIGH (dependent)
   Reasons:
   - Data pipeline suite is 5/7 PASS with 2 open FAILs (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015).
   - Both open defects are owned by Amir Hassan; HEL-D-014 is the same block as HEL-243.
   - HEL-D-015 (large file memory overflow ~210k records) is HIGH severity and still under investigation.
   - Cannot close the suite until Amir's defects are fixed and retested; due on last day of sprint leaves no buffer.

4. HEL-242 — Dashboard: chart rendering module
   Assignee: Tomas Rivera | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: In Progress | Points: 8
   Risk level: MEDIUM–HIGH
   Reasons:
   - 8-point task due 2026-07-16.
   - Testing: TC-602 (line chart) still IN PROGRESS; TC-603 (bar chart) NOT RUN.
   - Incomplete coverage with only a few days remaining before due date / sprint end.

5. HEL-247 — Performance benchmark: dashboard load
   Assignee: Derek Okafor | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: Not Started | Points: 3
   Risk level: MEDIUM–HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Not Started with due date on sprint end (2026-07-18).
   - TC-604 (load time benchmark, 100k records) NOT RUN.
   - Depends on dashboard components (HEL-241/HEL-242) being sufficiently complete to benchmark.

================================================================================
TASKS OF LOWER / WATCHLIST CONCERN
================================================================================

6. HEL-241 — Dashboard: data table component
   Assignee: Fatima Al-Rashid | Due: 2026-07-14 | Status: In Progress | Points: 5
   Risk level: MEDIUM (watch)
   Reasons:
   - Still In Progress with due date 2026-07-14 (before sprint end).
   - Mitigating factor: TC-601 (data table rendering, 10k records) already PASS.
   - May finish on time; monitor for slip past individual due date into sprint end.

7. HEL-248 — GeoSync license renewal coordination
   Assignee: Raj Patel | Due: 2026-07-14 | Status: In Progress | Points: 2
   Risk level: LOW–MEDIUM (watch)
   Reasons:
   - Small (2 pts) coordination task still In Progress near due date.
   - No test dependency; risk is mainly calendar/process, not technical.

================================================================================
NOT AT RISK
================================================================================

- HEL-244 — Integration test suite: auth flows
  Status: Done | Due: 2026-07-14
  Auth suite 4/4 PASS (TC-401–TC-404). Complete.

================================================================================
SUMMARY / RECOMMENDATIONS
================================================================================

Primary at-risk tasks for the 2026-07-18 sprint deadline:
  • HEL-243 (Blocked + open HIGH defect + external data dependency)
  • HEL-246 (Already "At Risk", large provisioning task)
  • HEL-245 (Blocked on HEL-D-014 / HEL-D-015 owned by Amir)
  • HEL-242 (Charts incomplete, 8 pts, due 07-16)
  • HEL-247 (Not Started, depends on dashboard work, due sprint end)

Critical path: Amir Hassan’s date normalization (HEL-243 / HEL-D-014) and large-file fix (HEL-D-015) gate HEL-245 and overall data-pipeline readiness. Prioritize unblocking Meridian sample data and defect fixes. Confirm UAT provisioning (HEL-246) status immediately. Accelerate chart work (HEL-242) so HEL-247 can start before 07-18.

content.text:
Assessment written to `sprint14_deadline_risk.txt`.

**Tasks at risk of missing the sprint deadline (2026-07-18):**

| Task | Risk | Why |
|------|------|-----|
| **HEL-243** (date format normalization) | **HIGH** | Blocked; open defect HEL-D-014; waiting on Meridian sample data due same day as task due date |
| **HEL-246** (UAT server provisioning) | **HIGH** | Already marked At Risk; 8-pt infra task due 07-16 |
| **HEL-245** (data pipeline test suite) | **HIGH** | 2 open HIGH defects (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015) block completion; due last day of sprint |
| **HEL-242** (chart rendering) | **MED–HIGH** | 8 pts; TC-602 in progress, TC-603 not run; due 07-16 |
| **HEL-247** (performance benchmark) | **MED–HIGH** | Not Started; depends on dashboard work; due sprint end |

**Watchlist:** HEL-241 (table component) and HEL-248 (GeoSync license) — still in progress near their 07-14 due dates.

**Not at risk:** HEL-244 (auth tests) — Done, 4/4 PASS.

Critical path is Amir’s defects (HEL-D-014/015), which gate the data pipeline suite and sprint readiness.
